statement: SLSA reached v1.0 in April 2023; the slsa.dev specification has since advanced to later 1.x releases defining progressive build-integrity levels.

evidence.quote: SLSA version 1.0 was released in April 2023 by OpenSSF ... v1.2 documentation

falsifier: slsa.dev/spec showing v1.0 (not 1.1/1.2) as latest stable would falsify the 'advanced' part; the precise current minor was not confirmed from the issuing site.
